issue.description:
## Description

- Use this as a disposable merge-window proof run. Prefer a test-only change unless a tiny supporting production change is absolutely necessary.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Add a unit test that proves the default search radius is 25 miles.
- Prefer a test-only diff.
- Do not change UI behavior.

## Validation

- The existing Symphony validation and smoke commands pass.
issue.title: Add a focused test for the default search radius

acceptance_criteria: Add a unit test that proves the default search radius is 25 miles.
